title: EVIDENCE_REJECTION
description: Sent by Actor or Claimant to the Referee to explicitly refuse evidence submission in response to an EVIDENCE_QUERY_REQUEST. Upon receipt, the Referee records the rejection via a CLAIM_ANCHOR (action_type: EVIDENCE_REJECTED) and proceeds with assessment reflecting the refusing party's non-participation.

incident_id.description: Incident identifier from the corresponding EVIDENCE_QUERY_REQUEST.

submitter_id.description: Terminal ID of the party refusing evidence submission.

reason.description: (Optional) Human-readable reason for refusing evidence submission.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this message was sent.
